mapper.select: SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.outCnt, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.outCnt * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS per FROM ( SELECT AS dd, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCnt FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE GROUP BY dd ) sub

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.hitCnt1, sub.hitCnt2, sub.hitCnt3, sub.hitCnt4, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt1 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt1Per, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt2 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt2Per, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt3 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt3Per, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt4 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt4Per, totalOutput.totalOutCnt FROM ( /* 지급결의된 개수 */ SELECT AS dd, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, concat(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(cd.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) AND INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, concat(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt4 FROM CARD_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA cd ON co.TSTM_YMD = cd.TSTM_YMD AND co.TSTM_NO = cd.TSTM_NO AND co.BRCD = cd.BRCD WHERE GROUP BY dd ) sub LEFT JOIN ( /* 전체 output 개수 */ SELECT AS dd, COUNT(*) AS totalOutCnt FROM CARD_OUTPUT co WHERE GROUP BY dd ) totalOutput ON sub.dd = totalOutput.dd

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.outCnt, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.outCnt * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS per FROM( SELECT AS dd, count(*) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN co.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCnt FROM BILL_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN BILL_OUTPUT co ON ci.TXBL_SRN = co.TXBL_SRN AND ci.BASE_YM = co.BASE_YM AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE GROUP BY dd ) sub

SELECT sub.dd, sub.total, sub.hitCnt1, sub.hitCnt2, sub.hitCnt3, sub.hitCnt4, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt1 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt1Per, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt2 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt2Per, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt3 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt3Per, TRUNCATE(CASE WHEN sub.total > 0 THEN (sub.hitCnt4 * 100.0) / sub.total ELSE 0 END, 2) AS hitCnt4Per, totalOutput.totalOutCnt FROM ( /* 지급결의된 개수 */ SELECT AS dd, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, concat(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(cd.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3, SUM(CASE WHEN cd.BASE_YM IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(co.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, cd.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) AND INSTR(co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, concat(cd.BRCD, '-', cd.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt4 FROM BILL_OUTPUT co INNER JOIN BILL_LEARNING_DATA cd ON co.BASE_YM = cd.BASE_YM AND co.TXBL_SRN = cd.TXBL_SRN AND co.BRCD = cd.BRCD WHERE GROUP BY dd ) sub LEFT JOIN ( /* 전체 output 개수 */ SELECT AS dd, COUNT(*) AS totalOutCnt FROM BILL_OUTPUT co WHERE GROUP BY dd ) totalOutput ON sub.dd = totalOutput.dd

when.test: searchCycle == null or searchCycle == '' or searchCycle == 1
searchCycle == null or searchCycle == '' or searchCycle == 1
